text: Code refactoring: Split ui.ts mega-store (2547 lines)
description:
ui.ts is too large, split into focused stores:
- navigation.ts: Column/phase selection, keyboard nav
- modals.ts: Modal state management
- graph.ts: Graph view state
- settings.ts: Project settings, preferences

Benefits: Better maintainability, clearer boundaries, easier testing

status.comment: Continued hard migration away from monolithic ui store toward domain stores. Added `ui/project-store.ts` and `ui/modal-store.ts`, expanded `ui/graph-store.ts` with selectedLink ownership, and migrated graph/watchdog consumers to direct domain stores (GraphLink, GraphFlowHandle, GraphSidePanel, GraphView, useGraphSimulation, useWebGLGraphRenderer, WatchdogPanel, WatchdogActionsOverlay, watchdog store, App.vue partial migration for project/modal view concerns). Full verification passes: `npm run type-check -w frontend` ✅ and `npm run test:unit -w frontend` ✅ (16 files, 65 tests). Remaining blocker: cross-domain mutation still centralized in ui action modules (keyboard/aim/selection/move) and App/navigation paths still depend on `useUIStore` compatibility shim; next step is extracting final navigation store and deleting shim fields.
